meaning: n.殖民地,侨民,(聚居的)一群同业,一批同行,(生物)群体
examples: Different animals in the colony had different manifestations of the disease.
America used to be a British colony.
What happened to the lost colony of the Americas?
It has been a positive experience, although the long winter meant this colony did not survive.
Come twilight, the streets glow with neon from famous landmarks like the Colony Theatre.
